eBird
(Mareca americana)

  • 27/05/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (David Kelly) "Drake. Found earlier in the day. Was with 4 Eurasian Wigeon on the new lagoon at high tide then flew onto the river mouth. Photographed."

Reed Warbler
More info
eBird
(Acrocephalus scirpaceus)

  • 27/05/26 John Muir Country Park 3 (Sam Shutt) "Known birds. All singing around Seafield lagoons and had brief views of all 3. Audio recorded and photographed."
  • 26/05/26 Seafield Lagoon 1 (David Kelly) "Singing , more metronomic than Sedge Warbler, not as excited and no mimicry. Known birds."
  • 26/05/26 John Muir Country Park 1 (Jarrod Hadfield) "Bird singing in Willows in the Links carpark. Presumed migrant. Have recording."
  • 26/05/26 Seafield Lagoon 2 (Jarrod Hadfield) "2 singing males. Neither in same place as bird on the 13/5."
